title: Call for aspirant cricket scorers to be trained
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The SWD Cricket Scorers...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The SWD Cricket Scorers Association has confirmed the training dates for the level D courses starting on 2 August.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The SWD Cricket Scorers Association has confirmed the training dates for the level D courses starting on 2 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The training will be presented free of charge and an exam session will be held on the final day.","html":"The training will be presented free of charge and an exam session will be held on the final day."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The sessions take place as follows:"},{"type":"list","items":["2 to 4 August at the Recreation Ground in Oudtshoorn","2 to 4 August at St Blaize Primary School in Mossel Bay","9 to 11 August at Imizamo Yethu High School in Thembalethu, George","16 to 18 August at St Paul’s Primary School in George"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Training times:","html":"Training times:"},{"type":"list","items":["Fridays: 17:00 to 20:00","Saturdays: 09:00 to 17:00","Sundays: 09:00 to 12:00 (exams)"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All enquiries can be directed to Pieter Stuurman at the SWD Cricket offices on 044-272 6604 or e-mail: [email protected].","html":"All enquiries can be directed to Pieter Stuurman at the SWD Cricket offices on 044-272 6604 or e-mail: [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Call for aspirant cricket scorers to be trained
